samples.raw_output:
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Hey Melanie! How's it going? I wanted to tell you about my school event last week. It was awesome! I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community. It was great to see their reactions. It made me reflect on how far I've come since I started transitioning three years ago."
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Hey Caroline! Great to hear from you. Sounds like your event was amazing! I'm so proud of you for spreading awareness and getting others involved in the LGBTQ community. You've come a long way since your transition - keep on inspiring people with your strength and courage!"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! Your backing really means a lot. I felt super powerful giving my talk. I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. It was wonderful to see how the audience related to what I said and how it inspired them to be better allies. Conversations about gender identity and inclusion are so necessary and I'm thankful for being able to give a voice to the trans community."
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline, you're doing an awesome job of inspiring others with your journey. It's great to be part of it and see how you're positively affecting so many. Talking about inclusivity and acceptance is crucial, and you're so brave to speak up for the trans community. Keep up the great work!"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Thanks Mel! Your kind words mean a lot. Sharing our experiences isn't always easy, but I feel it's important to help promote understanding and acceptance. I've been blessed with loads of love and support throughout this journey, and I want to pass it on to others. By sharing our stories, we can build a strong, supportive community of hope."
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Yeah, Caroline! It takes courage to talk about our own stories. But it's in these vulnerable moments that we bond and understand each other. We all have our different paths, but if we share them, we show people that they're not alone. Our stories can be so inspiring and encouraging to others who are facing the same challenges. Thank you for using your voice to create love, acceptance, and hope. You're doing amazing!"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Your words mean a lot to me. I'm grateful for the chance to share my story and give others hope. We all have unique paths, and by working together we can build a more inclusive and understanding world. I'm going to keep using my voice to make a change and lift others up. And you're part of that!"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline, for letting me join your journey. I'm so proud to be part of the difference you're making. Let's keep motivating and helping each other out as we journey through life. We can make a real impact together!"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Yeah Mel, let's spread love and understanding! Thanks for the support and encouragement. We can tackle life's challenges together! We got this!"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Yes, Caroline! We can do it. Your courage is inspiring. I want to be couragous for my family- they motivate me and give me love. What motivates you?"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! My friends, family and mentors are my rocks – they motivate me and give me the strength to push on. Here's a pic from when we met up last week!"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Wow, that photo is great! How long have you had such a great support system?"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Yeah, I'm really lucky to have them. They've been there through everything, I've known these friends for 4 years, since I moved from my home country. Their love and help have been so important especially after that tough breakup. I'm super thankful. Who supports you, Mel?"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "I'm lucky to have my husband and kids; they keep me motivated."
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Wow, what an amazing family pic! How long have you been married?"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "5 years already! Time flies- feels like just yesterday I put this dress on! Thanks, Caroline!"
entity<|#|>Caroline's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Caroline said: "Congrats, Melanie! You both looked so great on your wedding day! Wishing you many happy years together!"
entity<|#|>Melanie's statement at 7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023<|#|>Event<|#|>Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Appreciate your kind words. Looking forward to more happy years. Our family and moments make it all worth it."

entity<|#|>Event1<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen."
entity<|#|>Event2<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!"
entity<|#|>Event3<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt."
entity<|#|>Event4<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!"
entity<|#|>Event5<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?"
entity<|#|>Event6<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!"
entity<|#|>Event7<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?"
entity<|#|>Event8<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun."
entity<|#|>Event9<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience."
entity<|#|>Event10<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill."
entity<|#|>Event11<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet."
entity<|#|>Event12<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close."
entity<|#|>Event13<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!"
entity<|#|>Event14<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?"
entity<|#|>Event15<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen."
entity<|#|>Event16<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!"
entity<|#|>Event17<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon."
entity<|#|>Event18<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!"
entity<|#|>Event19<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward."
entity<|#|>Event20<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!"
entity<|#|>Event21<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Always good to hear! See you later!"

entity<|#|>Joanna<|#|>Person<|#|>Joanna is a person who speaks at certain times.
entity<|#|>Nate<|#|>Person<|#|>Nate is a person who speaks at certain times.
entity<|#|>Event1<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen."
entity<|#|>Event2<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!"
entity<|#|>Event3<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt."
entity<|#|>Event4<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!"
entity<|#|>Event5<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?"
entity<|#|>Event6<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!"
entity<|#|>Event7<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?"
entity<|#|>Event8<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun."
entity<|#|>Event9<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience."
entity<|#|>Event10<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill."
entity<|#|>Event11<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet."
entity<|#|>Event12<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close."
entity<|#|>Event13<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!"
entity<|#|>Event14<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?"
entity<|#|>Event15<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen."
entity<|#|>Event16<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!"
entity<|#|>Event17<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon."
entity<|#|>Event18<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!"
entity<|#|>Event19<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward."
entity<|#|>Event20<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!"
entity<|#|>Event21<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Always good to hear! See you later!"
entity<|#|>Location1<|#|>Location<|#|>6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022

entity<|#|>Content1<|#|>Content<|#|>Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen.
entity<|#|>Content2<|#|>Content<|#|>Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!
entity<|#|>Content3<|#|>Content<|#|>Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt.
entity<|#|>Content4<|#|>Content<|#|>It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!
entity<|#|>Content5<|#|>Content<|#|>That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?
entity<|#|>Content6<|#|>Content<|#|>I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!
entity<|#|>Content7<|#|>Content<|#|>They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?
entity<|#|>Content8<|#|>Content<|#|>No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun.
entity<|#|>Content9<|#|>Content<|#|>Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience.
entity<|#|>Content10<|#|>Content<|#|>Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill.
entity<|#|>Content11<|#|>Content<|#|>I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet.
entity<|#|>Content12<|#|>Content<|#|>Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close.
entity<|#|>Content13<|#|>Content<|#|>Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!
entity<|#|>Content14<|#|>Content<|#|>Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?
entity<|#|>Content15<|#|>Content<|#|>I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen.
entity<|#|>Content16<|#|>Content<|#|>Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!
entity<|#|>Content17<|#|>Content<|#|>Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon.
entity<|#|>Content18<|#|>Content<|#|>Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!
entity<|#|>Content19<|#|>Content<|#|>Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward.
entity<|#|>Content20<|#|>Content<|#|>Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!
entity<|#|>Content21<|#|>Content<|#|>Always good to hear! See you later!

entity<|#|>Event8<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun."
entity<|#|>Event9<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience."
entity<|#|>Event10<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill."
entity<|#|>Event11<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet."
entity<|#|>Event12<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close."
entity<|#|>Event13<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!"
entity<|#|>Event14<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?"
entity<|#|>Event15<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen."
entity<|#|>Event16<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!"
entity<|#|>Event17<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon."
entity<|#|>Event18<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Nate at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!"
entity<|#|>Event19<|#|>Event<|#|>Utterance by Joanna at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022: "Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward."

entity<|#|>Content1<|#|>Content<|#|>Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen.
entity<|#|>Content2<|#|>Content<|#|>Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!
entity<|#|>Content3<|#|>Content<|#|>Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt.
entity<|#|>Content4<|#|>Content<|#|>It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!
entity<|#|>Content5<|#|>Content<|#|>That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?
entity<|#|>Content6<|#|>Content<|#|>I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!
entity<|#|>Content7<|#|>Content<|#|>They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?
entity<|#|>Content8<|#|>Content<|#|>No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun.
entity<|#|>Content9<|#|>Content<|#|>Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience.
entity<|#|>Content10<|#|>Content<|#|>Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill.
entity<|#|>Content11<|#|>Content<|#|>I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet.
entity<|#|>Content12<|#|>Content<|#|>Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close.
entity<|#|>Content13<|#|>Content<|#|>Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!
entity<|#|>Content14<|#|>Content<|#|>Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?
entity<|#|>Content15<|#|>Content<|#|>I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen.
entity<|#|>Content16<|#|>Content<|#|>Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!
entity<|#|>Content17<|#|>Content<|#|>Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon.
entity<|#|>Content18<|#|>Content<|#|>Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!
entity<|#|>Content19<|#|>Content<|#|>Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward.
entity<|#|>Content20<|#|>Content<|#|>Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!
entity<|#|>Content21<|#|>Content<|#|>Always good to hear! See you later!
